title: Manager Supply Chain Management (all genders)
required_skills: 5+ years consulting or industry experience in supply chain / logistics / transportation
Proven sales and project management experience
Excellent academic background (Master, MBA, or PhD)
Strong consulting methods and PM skills
Understanding of commercial and operational supply chain processes
matched_skills: Master's degrees in Management & Entrepreneurship (Leuphana) and PR & Advertising (Shih Hsin) — meets academic requirement
Project management experience — HSBC PMO governance, Hapag-Lloyd agile delivery, 5+ yrs total
Stakeholder management — C-suite reporting at HSBC, cross-functional coordination at Hapag-Lloyd
Strategic roadmap and analysis — ECE Group competitive analysis, market sizing, executive-ready reports
English C1 and German B1 — bilingual capability (German weaker than preferred)
Chinese C2 / Cantonese C2 — valuable additional languages for APAC supply chain context
B2B relationship management — vendor/partner management at IPC Marketing
KPI framework design — burn-rate dashboards and KPI reporting
missing_skills: Supply chain / logistics / transportation domain expertise
Sales experience in consulting context (proposal writing, client acquisition)
German at business-fluent level (currently B1 only)
Deep understanding of supply chain operational processes (TMS, WMS, inventory)
core_responsibilities: Lead digital and operational transformation programs across logistics and supply chain
Design and implement integrated strategies strengthening cross-functional collaboration
Develop and execute change management approaches for new ways of working
Shape tailored transformation solutions aligned to client priorities and measurable impact
Build and nurture long-term relationships with key stakeholders, clients, and partners
recommended_emphasis: HSBC USD 8M digital transformation programme governance as transformation program leadership evidence
ECE Group competitive analysis and market sizing as strategic consulting-adjacent work
Multi-workstream stakeholder coordination at HSBC to demonstrate complex program management
Hapag-Lloyd agile delivery to show operational execution capability
Multilingual profile (English C1, Chinese C2, German B1) as asset for international supply chain clients
summary: Scoring 37.5, this is a weak match. Eraneos seeks a supply chain consulting manager with 5+ years of domain-specific logistics/transportation experience and strong German proficiency — Boru's background is in PMO governance and marketing, not supply chain. However, the transferable strengths in programme governance (HSBC), strategic analysis (ECE Group), and stakeholder management may partially bridge the gap. German language (B1) is below the expected business-fluent level. Only consider applying if willing to position the role as a cross-sector pivot with strong emphasis on transformation programme management.
